mapper.delete: DELETE FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND hospital_id IS NULL
DELETE FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scm_supplier_menu_auth (id, supplier_id, hospital_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.supplierId}, #{item.hospitalId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT menu_id FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND hospital_id IS NULL
SELECT DISTINCT menu_id FROM scm_supplier_menu_auth WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
